finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_18.md:399; chapters/chapter_18.md:403; chapters/chapter_18.md:424; chapters/chapter_18.md:490; chapters/chapter_18.md:506; chapters/chapter_18.md:510
finding_results.notes: Rebuilt the compulsion crest with embodied friction (slip, shin pain spike, nausea, tremor, public visibility) before reflective language, then replaced the calming close with ongoing bargaining pressure and conditional sleep.
Removed manuscript-aware phrasing and anchored Anika's memory to the in-world fee-waiver/hardship paperwork event in April.
Added a new second-half decision: Anika discloses the lapse, Jonah confiscates the timer and imposes a no-solo plan, and Ravi/Priya behavior updates to enforce next-day supervision.
Utility balance is now explicitly reconciled in-text from prior baseline and payment ($1,860.12 - $620.00 = $1,240.12), eliminating unstated arithmetic assumptions.

summary: All required structural/craft findings were resolved in-place: debt continuity is explicit, process leakage is removed, the relapse beat now carries immediate consequence, and the back-half structure now includes a concrete disclosure-driven plan change that alters other characters' behavior.
